style_summary: A dense flat poster system built from giant black display type, chunky white mascot figures, thick cartoon outlines, tilted cyan or mint color panels, compact badges, tiny red accents, and a clean off-white print surface.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main rounded mascot, figure, product, object, or visual subject
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: main action, gesture, presentation, or interaction
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: simplified prop, object, product, icon, card, or graphic device
environment_variables.LOCATION: flat poster setting, abstract environment, or editorial surface
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: secondary panels, labels, tabs, grids, microtype, or simple scene blocks
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: main headline or graphic display text
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small supporting label, microcopy, or index text
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small red stamp, check, alert mark, badge, speech bubble, or simple symbol
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: styling direction for mascot body, figure treatment, or visible human elements

style_fidelity_anchors: Poster-first composition with an oversized black headline occupying the top band, side band, or dominant title block.
High layout density with very little empty space, while all shapes remain simple, flat, and readable.
One or two rounded white mascot-like figures or simplified graphic subjects drawn with very thick black outlines and minimal facial marks.
One large tilted cyan, teal, mint, or lemon color panel crossing the middle of the frame as the main graphic mass.
Secondary green, red, black, or pale color blocks sit behind the subject and are edged by heavy black strokes.
Hard flat fills, no painterly shading, no realistic lighting, and only light paper-like texture.
Ultra-heavy geometric block lettering with compressed spacing, mixed large and small type scales, and strong cropping.
A small badge, stamp, speech bubble, warning mark, or editorial label acts as a graphic accent, never as a real logo.
Bold rounded black linework creates a sticker, comic poster, and screenprint feeling.
Palette stays mostly off-white, black, cyan or mint, with one small red accent or related high-contrast punctuation color.
Foreground subject overlaps the headline or color panel, creating a layered flat print-collage hierarchy.
Clean social-poster finish with slight screenprint compression, not glossy product advertising.
source_content_to_avoid: The exact white cloud-like reference character with the I+I face and raised arm.
The reclining figure hidden under the cyan blanket or canopy from the source image.
Coffee, coffee cups, coffee icons, or a no-coffee story premise.
The original design-company or design-studio headline and source speech-bubble wording.
OFFF Course logo, course badges, platform marks, creator IDs, watermarks, QR codes, app screenshots, or UI windows.
The exact vertical side signature strip, bottom slogan, and source layout story.
Any direct copy of the source mascot anatomy, pose, prop positions, typography wording, or composition.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: flat editorial mascot poster, comic-sticker poster system, bold portfolio cover graphic
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: The image is built from flat layers: off-white paper, giant black type, a backing panel, one diagonal color slab, a simplified foreground mascot or subject, then one small accent mark. The typography works as architecture rather than captioning.
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: The main subject is large and cropped near the lower edge or lower corner. It overlaps the diagonal panel or headline and reads as a sticker-like graphic object instead of a detailed illustration.
visual_deconstruction.camera_perspective: Orthographic flat poster perspective with graphic diagonal movement. Avoid natural camera depth, realistic space, or cinematic lighting.
visual_deconstruction.typography_behavior: Ultra-black display lettering uses huge scale, tight spacing, stacked words, vertical title blocks, cropped edges, and compact side labels. Text is short and graphic.
visual_deconstruction.color_behavior: The base is off-white and deep black. Cyan, mint, lemon, teal, or related bright panels form the major graphic mass. Red is a small editorial punctuation mark or card accent.
visual_deconstruction.graphic_elements: Speech bubbles, badges, stamps, prohibition symbols, thick borders, portfolio cards, tab strips, side indexes, flat grids, and microtype blocks create density.
visual_deconstruction.texture_finish: Flat raster illustration with vector-like hard fills, subtle paper grain, compressed screenprint edges, and thick uniform linework.
visual_deconstruction.mood: Playful, blunt, design-culture adjacent, editorial, portfolio-ready, slightly sarcastic, and poster-like rather than narrative or realistic.

image_treatment.rendering: flat vector-like raster illustration with thick cartoon linework and screenprint poster texture
image_treatment.line_quality: uniform heavy black strokes with rounded corners, blunt joins, and sticker-like silhouettes
image_treatment.lighting: no naturalistic lighting; contrast comes from flat color, black type, and hard-edged shape overlap
image_treatment.texture: subtle off-white paper grain and slightly compressed poster edges, never dirty grunge or glossy gradients

composition.primary_structure: giant black title block, one diagonal color slab, secondary backing panel, foreground mascot or graphic subject, small badge or label accent
composition.layout_density: dense but readable, with large simple shapes replacing detailed scenery
composition.layering: background paper, huge typography, backing panel, diagonal slab, subject, badge or bubble, small side type

aspect_ratio_rules.9:16: stack the headline in a tall top or side band, keep the mascot or subject large in the lower half, and run the diagonal panel corner to corner
aspect_ratio_rules.16:9: place the headline as a massive left, top-left, or vertical title block, stretch the diagonal panel across the center, and anchor the subject to one lower corner

typography.headline: ultra-heavy geometric black display type, very large, tight spacing, blocky proportions, sometimes stacked, vertical, cropped, or interlocked
typography.secondary: small bold sans-serif labels, compact side strips, project index text, stamps, or repeated microtype
typography.text_quantity: use a few large words and a few small labels; do not create long paragraphs
typography.placement: headline must be integrated into the composition as a structural graphic block, not floated as a caption
typography.legibility: prefer short invented English or Chinese headline text; avoid real brands, source slogans, or platform UI

color_palette.proportions: black and off-white carry most of the image; cyan, mint, lemon, or teal form the major graphic masses; red or a related accent stays small and decisive

design_rules: Keep the image poster-flat and graphic; do not add realistic depth, cast shadows, or natural camera lighting.
Let the largest typography feel almost too big for the frame.
Use one primary diagonal color slab or one dominant tilted panel; do not multiply panels into a noisy abstract background.
Use one foreground mascot, figure, product, or portfolio subject with simple shapes and heavy black outline.
Add at most one speech bubble, badge, stamp, red card cluster, or prohibition-style symbol as the main accent.
Make the story new while preserving the same giant type, diagonal slab, flat color, thick outline, and screenprint grammar.
For portfolio covers, keep the Chinese title bold and graphic, with project cards and index labels behaving as poster elements rather than UI.
do: Use oversized black display type as a structural element.
Use off-white paper, cyan or mint panels, lemon or green slabs, and a tiny red accent.
Use simple rounded mascot bodies, portfolio icons, or graphic subjects with minimal facial marks and thick outlines.
Use thick black borders, flat screenprint color, compact labels, and short editorial text.
Keep props iconic and simplified, with strong silhouette readability.
avoid: Do not use coffee, coffee cups, design-company wording, course logos, watermarks, platform marks, app screenshots, or QR codes.
Do not copy the same white cloud-like mascot, reclining hidden figure, raised-arm pose, source headline, or source speech bubble.
Do not turn the style into a realistic product ad, glossy 3D render, anime frame, painterly illustration, or detailed comic page.
Do not add dense background scenery, price labels, long paragraph text, official brand marks, or UI overlays.
Do not use glossy gradients, photographic lighting, soft airbrush shading, or realistic material rendering.
negative_prompt: coffee, coffee cup, no coffee icon, design company, design studio, course logo, OFFF, watermark, username, social media watermark, QR code, app screenshot, UI window, exact reference mascot, reclining hidden figure, realistic 3D render, anime scene, glossy product photography, painterly illustration, complex background detail, tiny paragraphs, brand logo, platform UI, official logo

values.SUBJECT_ACTION: leaning into a lemon yellow diagonal title panel while presenting the portfolio cards

values.LOCATION: flat off-white design portfolio cover surface
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: vertical black title block, lemon panel, red project cards, compact side labels, and tiny grid marks
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small red stamp and check mark
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: clean white sticker mascot body with heavy black outline and no realistic clothing detail

values.WARDROBE_STYLE: sticker-like white body with thick black outline and no clothing detail

values.SUBJECT_ACTION: pointing at a red sensor puck clipped to a leaf-shaped panel
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: red sensor puck and simplified plant monitor card
